subject: fix(build): exclude data dirs from Tailwind scanning, add test scenario
body:
Tailwind v4 auto-scans all subdirectories of the CSS file. JSON data
files in public/data-commits/ and public/repos/ contain commit history
with Tailwind-like class names (e.g. "z-[9999] → z-[80]" from other
projects' changelogs). This caused phantom z-index CSS utilities in
the build output — unused but violating the "no ad-hoc values" rule.

Fix: @source not directives in styles.css exclude both directories.
Build output now contains only scale-mapped z-index values.

Also:
- Added z-index visual stacking test scenario (TESTING_GUIDE.md)
- Documented hamburger menu stacking context limitation (TODO.md):
  backdrop/dropdown trapped inside header z-21, drawers (z-30) render
  above the backdrop. Fix would require portaling — low priority.

Tags: build, tailwind, z-index, testing, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: z-index-scale
Semver: patch
